title: Count custom fields — operationId trap (platform-and-schema skill)
prompt: Using the platform-and-schema skill, answer: how many custom fields are defined in total? Note: the customfields resource has no `visibility` field, so do not filter on it. The DB noun is `customfields`, but the client/CLI operation is not named `listCustomfields` — discover the correct operation before calling it. Output just the number on the RESULT line, e.g. `RESULT: 9`.
